summary: Iteration 54 - Invite Reward System testing complete. All 15 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend tests verified InviteSection 4-stats display and ProfilePage influence_chain with active_invitees and invite_credits.
critical_code_review_comments: Invite reward logic at server.py lines 3769-3814 correctly implements first-action reward
Double-credit prevention via invite_rewards collection check at line 3776
invite-stats endpoint returns all 4 stats (total_invites_used, active_invitees, invite_credits, codes_remaining) at lines 4840-4906
Profile record returns influence_chain with invite_credits and active_invitees at lines 6850-6910
InviteSection.js displays 4 stats with data-testid attributes (invite-used-count, invite-active-count, invite-credits-count, invite-remaining-count)
DailyOrientationQuestion.js has invite-reward-notification with data-testid at lines 232-238
ProfilePage.js InfluenceChain shows active_invitees and invite_credits with data-testid (profile-active-invitees, profile-invite-credits)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users from iteration 53. invite_rewards collection has record: {inviter_id, invitee_id, credited_at, direction}. Inviter has invite_credits=1, invitee has answered=1 (active).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 tests the NEW Invite REWARD system (not just invite codes). Key findings: (1) Reward triggers on first daily action (answered_count <= 1), not on signup. (2) invite_rewards collection stores {inviter_id, invitee_id, credited_at, direction}. (3) Double-credit prevention by checking invite_rewards.find_one before incrementing. (4) InviteSection shows 4 stats: הצטרפו (joined), פעילים (active), נקודות (credits), נותרו (remaining). (5) ProfilePage InfluenceChain shows: 'X פעילים' and 'X נקודות ערך'. (6) DailyOrientationQuestion shows invite_reward notification with message_he when invitee takes first action.

backend_api_tests.test_invite_stats_returns_invite_credits: PASS - invite_credits field present and integer
backend_api_tests.test_profile_record_returns_influence_ch: PASS - influence_chain has invite_credits and active_invitees
backend_api_tests.test_daily_answer_endpoint_exists: PASS - includes invite_reward field in response
backend_api_tests.test_user_without_inviter_gets_no_reward: PASS - no invite_reward for users without inviter
backend_api_tests.test_active_invitees_count_matches_list: PASS - count consistent with active=true in list

frontend_ui_tests.invite_section_4_stats: PASS - All 4 stats displayed (used, active, credits, remaining)
frontend_ui_tests.profile_influence_chain: PASS - Shows 'הבאת לשדה: Visionary', '1 פעילים', '1 נקודות ערך'

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/orientation/invite-stats/{user_id} - returns invite_credits, active_invitees, invitees with active/actions
GET /api/profile/{user_id}/record - returns influence_chain with invite_credits and active_invitees

reward_flow_verified.description: Full invite reward flow tested and verified
steps: 1. User registers with invite code → invited_by field set
3. System checks invite_rewards collection for existing record
4. If no existing reward: increment inviter's invite_credits, create invite_rewards record
5. Return invite_reward object with message_he to show notification
6. Double-credit prevented by checking existing reward before incrementing

verified_data.invite_rewards_record: Found with inviter_id, invitee_id, credited_at, direction
